name: hows-it-going-mg
description: Remotion motion graphics for How's It Going? Instagram reel

scripts.render:png: npx remotion render src/index.ts HowsItGoing out/frame-%04d.png --image-format=png
scripts.render:mov: npx remotion render src/index.ts HowsItGoing out/overlay.mov --codec=prores --prores-profile=4444
